notes: SOFT overnight trials — ZERO machine reboots (Jonathan's rule after the 19:09 reboot-loop incident). Process-level restarts only (M3_Stop/M3_Start), halt-with-machines-up on ANY anomaly; a true wedge (rc75) gets live_wedge_capture (spindumps both ranks) then HALT — no auto-reboot ever. Watch RTR errno failures across restarts as the link-degradation signal. Baselines: evening fresh-boot 8/8 = 25.8-26.6 t/s decode, prefill 366-368 @16k; warm-restart persistcheck round 1 = 25.08 (dashboard tab open, confounded).

trials.name: agent-traffic LONG (12 cycles, ~84 tool-call turns)
trials.why: Task 9 first full pass: long tool-call agent session on the winning config. The 2026-07-05 morning wedge was a short plain decode — this is that regime plus tools, context growth, cache reuse.

trials.name: pristine, poller OFF (A/B baseline)
trials.why: Dashboard-overhead A/B leg 1: no status polling during rounds.
trials.note: WEDGE — spindumps captured BEFORE any recovery, machines LEFT UP

trials.name: pristine, poller ON at dashboard rate (A/B)
trials.why: Dashboard-overhead A/B leg 2: /api/status polled every 2.5s (worst-case active tab). Delta vs leg 1 = true dashboard cost. >0.5 t/s -> make dashboard poll adaptive.

trials.name: iogpu tuned (260096/122880) + restart
trials.why: First-ever rank1 OS wired-cap lift (sudo works now). Prefill suspect: rank1 rewires 84GB per 4096-tok chunk under a ~96GB default cap. Watch the prefill probe number especially.

trials.name: FAST_SYNCH=0 + restart
trials.why: mlx#3142 fence-stall insurance config: measure its speed cost on our workload. If ~free and stable, it removes the wontfix stall class entirely.

trials.name: back-to-back rounds (gap=0) on pristine + restart
trials.why: Idle-gap hypothesis, soft edition: sustained collectives with no idle windows between rounds.

trials.name: ring backend speed anchor + restart
trials.why: TCP-over-TB control: decode + prefill comparison against jaccl on the same night, same machines, same warm state.

trials.name: FINAL: pristine restore + validation
trials.why: Leave the cluster in the exact production config, freshly validated, prefill-probed. Morning arrives to a green endpoint.
